rootCauseContract: OpenCode officially supports custom OpenAI-compatible providers through @ai-sdk/openai-compatible, so a new transport bridge would duplicate the common Chat Completions broker.
regressionChecks: the official CLI runs from an immutable integrity-bound package
pure one-shot JSON mode exits without TUI interaction
only completed text events become the benchmark answer
remote model fetches, plugins, Claude state, LSP downloads, updates, sharing, and internet tools are disabled
no adapter-specific gateway path is introduced
